title: Scolymocephalus repens
taxonomy: Scolymocephalus repens is a species of flowering plant, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Lamiaceae, also known as the mint family. Further classification places it within the subfamily Lamioideae and the tribe Lamieae. This classification indicates its relationship to other plants within the Lamiaceae family. Scolymocephalus repens is native to South America, and its specific classification helps in understanding its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. The classification of Scolymocephalus repens also aids in the identification of similar species within the same family.
